title: B1 speaking exam: role play
subtitle: Handle a practical role-play.
overview: Role-play needs purpose, questions, negotiation, closing.
Keep polite control of the task.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I am looking for information about...
So we will leave it like that.

items.es: Estoy buscando información sobre cursos de español.
items.en: I am looking for information about Spanish courses.
What options are there in the afternoon?

items.es: Me vendría mejor un curso dos veces por semana.
items.en: A course twice a week would work better for me.
Could you send me the prices by email?
Perfect, so we will leave it like that.

lines.speaker: A
lines.es: Buenas tardes, estoy buscando un curso de español.
lines.en: Good afternoon, I am looking for a Spanish course.

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Tenemos clases por la mañana y por la tarde.
lines.en: We have classes in the morning and in the afternoon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.es: Me vendría mejor por la tarde. ¿Cuánto cuesta?
lines.en: The afternoon would work better for me. How much does it cost?

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Cuesta ciento veinte euros al mes.
lines.en: It costs one hundred twenty euros per month.
